nasb.text: When it was evening, the disciples came to Him and said, “This place is desolate and the hour is already late; so send the crowds away, that they may go into the villages and buy food for themselves.”

esv.text: Now when it was evening, the disciples came to him and said, “This is a desolate place, and the day is now over; send the crowds away to go into the villages and buy food for themselves.”

cnv.text: 黃昏的時候，門徒前來對他說：“這是曠野的地方，時間也不早了，請叫群眾散開，好讓他們往村裡去，買自己的食物吧。”

ccb.text: 黄昏时，门徒过来对耶稣说：“这里是荒郊野外，天又晚了，请遣散众人，好让他们到村庄去自己买些吃的。”

csbs.text: 黄昏的时候，门徒们来到耶稣面前，说：“这是个荒僻的地方，而且天已经晚了。请遣散人群，好让他们到村庄去为自己买些食物。”
